overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 118 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 118 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Vercel CLI now supports signing blob URLs
items.summary_zh: 重点：You can now generate signed URLs for Vercel Blob directly from the Vercel CLI. A signed URL is a scoped URL with a set expiration time that lets you perform a single operation on a specific object. Each URL is scoped to one operation ( get , head , put , or
items.summary_en: Focus: You can now generate signed URLs for Vercel Blob directly from the Vercel CLI. A signed URL is a scoped URL with a set expiration time that lets you perform a single operation on a specific object. items.title: Increased limit for projects per Git repo
items.summary_zh: 重点：Hobby users can now connect up to 25 projects per repository, up from 10. This makes it easier for users to onboard monorepos and use cases where one codebase maps to many deployable apps. Learn more about repository connection limits .
items.summary_en: Focus: Hobby users can now connect up to 25 projects per repository, up from 10. This makes it easier for users to onboard monorepos and use cases where one codebase maps to many deployable apps. Learn more about repository connection limits .
